note_patch.E14: Theon rode in Robb's 30-man battle guard (cat-10:53, 'Theon Greyjoy' named) and is at the head of the victorious fighters dragging Jaime up the slope (cat-10:101, 'with Theon and the Greatjon at their head'); the node's wiki prose also states he 'kills men in the battle' (ACOK). Tier-2 -- present and fighting; the explicit book combat-act line is thin (the cat-10:53 guard-membership is the load-bearing basis).
